# static-env-var

[![Build](https://github.com/DenisGorbachev/static-env-var/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/DenisGorbachev/static-env-var)
[![Documentation](https://docs.rs/static-env-var/badge.svg)](https://docs.rs/static-env-var)

<!-- crate documentation start -->
This crate provides a [`static_env_var!`] macro for loading the environment variables statically in a `LazyLock`.

[`static_env_var!`]: https://docs.rs/static-env-var/latest/static_env_var/macro.static_env_var.html

<!-- crate documentation end -->

## Installation

```shell
cargo add static-env-var
```
